feed.title: Divy Gandhi — Portfolio
feed.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · Data Analyst · Finance Aspirant

entry.title: Divy Gandhi — Profile
entry.summary: Full-Stack Developer, Data Analyst and Finance Aspirant building scalable systems and financial analytics platforms.
entry.content:
Divy Gandhi

Full-Stack Developer · Data Analyst · Finance Aspirant

I design scalable web applications and transform raw data into decision-ready insights. My work combines engineering, data analytics, and financial modeling to support business and investment decisions.

Currently located in Vadodara, Gujarat, India and open to global opportunities.

entry.title: Academic Background
entry.content:
Bachelor's in Computer Science

Government Engineering College Gandhinagar

2023 — 2027

CGPA: 8.88

Higher Secondary

LBSV Vadodara

2021 — 2023

Percentile: 95

entry.title: Technical Stack
entry.summary: Technologies used in development, analytics, and data systems.
entry.content:
Frontend

  • React
  • Next.js
  • Tailwind CSS

Backend and APIs

  • Node.js
  • Express
  • FastAPI
  • Python

Databases

  • PostgreSQL
  • MongoDB
  • MySQL
  • Redis

Data Analytics

  • NumPy
  • Pandas
  • Scikit-learn
  • Matplotlib
  • Streamlit
  • Power BI

DevOps and Automation

  • Git
  • Docker
  • n8n

entry.title: Project — VaproShine Platform
entry.summary: Steam-cleaning booking platform with analytics dashboards.
entry.content:
VaproShine

A mobile steam-cleaning booking platform with real-time job tracking and operational dashboards.

  • Next.js web application
  • Razorpay payment integration
  • Admin and owner dashboards
  • Operational KPI monitoring
  • Power BI business intelligence dashboards

entry.title: Project — VaproShine Power BI Dashboard
entry.summary: Business intelligence dashboard designed for operational decision-making.
entry.content:
Power BI Analytics Dashboard

A five-page Power BI dashboard designed for business decision-making rather than vanity metrics.

  • Revenue conversion analysis
  • Customer retention metrics
  • Coupon impact tracking
  • Service ratings analysis
  • Automation health monitoring

entry.title: Project — Finsight Equity Research Framework
entry.summary: Framework for equity research and financial statement analysis.
entry.content:
Finsight

A sector-agnostic equity analysis framework designed around universal financial evaluation layers.

  • Financial statement analysis
  • Valuation logic
  • Decision modeling
  • Equity research framework

entry.title: Leadership and Experience
entry.content:
Entrepreneurship Cell — GECG

Technical Lead (July 2025 — Present)

  • Led a team of eight developers
  • Designed event platforms and registration systems
  • Increased event participation by 40%
  • Reduced coordination time by 50%

Hack The Spring 2026

Finance Team

  • Managed event budgeting
  • Handled sponsor funds and vendor payments
  • Performed financial reconciliation

entry.title: Achievements and Certifications
entry.content:
• Financial Accounting and Analysis Certification — Score 86/100
  • SEBI Investor Certification — Score 45/50
  • Capital Markets Course — Infosys Springboard
  • 2nd Rank out of 133 students in Semester 3
  • Certificate of Excellence — Devang Mehta IT Awards

entry.title: Career Direction
entry.summary: Career vision combining engineering, analytics and financial markets.
entry.content:
I focus on building systems that transform raw data into financial and strategic decisions.

My work combines full-stack engineering, analytics platforms, and financial modeling.

I am preparing for an MBA in Finance and CFA to operate at the intersection of technology, markets, and investment decision systems.
